---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for ClawPipe
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

<!-- Example: As a developer using the SDK, I cannot route requests by latency budget alone,
     which forces me to hard-code model names instead of letting the Router decide. -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as possible.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

<!-- Define what "done" looks like. E.g.:
- [ ] `pipe.prompt(...)` accepts a `maxLatencyMs` option
- [ ] Router skips models whose p95 latency exceeds the budget
- [ ] Unit tests cover budget enforcement logic
-->

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Impact

- **Pipeline stage affected**: Booster / Packer / Cache / Router / Gateway / Learner / SDK / Other
- **Breaking change?**: Yes / No
- **Estimated user impact**: Low / Medium / High

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, links to related issues, or references.
